<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_mission_modifier/styles.css" /><infobox theme="mission-modifier-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''<br/><span style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal; opacity: 0.8;">Mission Modifier</span></format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="can_be_chosen">
            <label>Selectable</label>
            <format>{{{can_be_chosen}}}</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>Internal ID</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
Infobox for mission modifiers (game's internal name: "directives").

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox mission modifier
|name = Display name (e.g. "Cleanse")
|api_name = Numeric ID
|icon = Icon filename
|can_be_chosen = Yes | No
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
